title: Turkish Avocado Bowl
description: A hearty and healthy Turkish-inspired bowl filled with slow-cooked lamb, creamy avocado, and a variety of fresh vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the cumin and paprika. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the lamb mixture to a baking dish and bake, uncovered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through and the flavors have melded together.
While the lamb is cooking, toast some bread or serve with pita.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the slow-cooked lamb on top of a bed of greens, followed by diced avocado, chopped parsley, and a sprinkle of sumac.
